_source: Tamazia Developer Implementation Document v1.0 Section 11 — verbatim
_notes: Single source of truth for which frameworks apply to which sector and geography. Update this file when frameworks change rather than hard-coding into pages. Read by the Tamazia Instrument (functions/api/audit.js) at audit time for sector-aware compliance matching.

legal.name: Law Firms and Legal Practitioners

UK.scope: Standards 8.7 and 8.9 on client information and publicity
Bar Standards Board advertising and publicity
Reserved legal activities and authorised persons

EU.scope: Council of Bars and Law Societies of Europe advertising standards
High-risk AI systems used in legal practice
Lawful basis and data minimisation in legal marketing

Middle East.code: UAE Federal Arbitration Law No. 6 of 2018

US.scope: Communications concerning a lawyer's services, including advertising and solicitation
Jurisdiction-specific advertising rules per US state

trigger_events_2025_2026: SRA AML enforcement: 935 proactive engagements in 2024-25, fines up to GBP 25,000
SRA increased fining power active since July 2022 enabling on-the-spot GBP 25k fines
Three UK firms enforced against AI-generated content without solicitor review (early 2026)

healthcare.name: Healthcare and Medical

UK.scope: Medicines, medical devices, health and beauty
Doctors professional conduct including social media and online presence

EU.scope: Marketing of medical devices in EU

Middle East.scope: Ministry of Health and Prevention UAE
Saudi Food and Drug Authority advertising rules

trigger_events_2025_2026: MHRA prosecuted unlicensed POM weight-loss advertising 2025
ASA upheld Beautaholics LED face mask November 2025 for unauthorised medicinal claims
ASA upheld Dr Bunny Aesthetics ruling on misleading Dr title in cosmetic clinic ads
ASA Active Ad Monitoring AI system flagging medicinal claims across cosmetic sector

hospitality.name: Hotels and Hospitality

UK.code: Consumer Protection from Unfair Trading Regulations 2008

UK.scope: Guest data and booking flow consent

Middle East.scope: Department of Tourism and Commerce Marketing
Abu Dhabi Department of Culture and Tourism

trigger_events_2025_2026: ASA upheld misleading hospitality price comparison rulings through 2025 and 2026
Booking.com and Expedia OTA commission ranges 15 to 25% on every reservation
DTCM enforcement tightening on Dubai hospitality marketing claims

real_estate.name: Real Estate, PBSA, BTR, and Mixed-Use Residential

UK.code: Consumer Protection from Unfair Trading Regulations 2008

UK.scope: The Property Ombudsman codes of practice

EU.scope: Buyer and tenant data marketing pipelines

Middle East.code: ADREC standards Abu Dhabi Real Estate Centre

US.code: SEC Reg D and Reg A

trigger_events_2025_2026: PBSA aggregator commission 15 to 20% per international student booking
BTR operators launching new schemes need direct-to-resident pipelines
UAE Capital Markets Law 2026 extends regulatory reach to cross-border property solicitation
FCA enforcement on property-as-investment financial promotions accelerating

fnb.name: Restaurants, Bars, and F and B

UK.code: ASA CAP Code food and beverage
HFSS Junk Food Advertising Restrictions effective 5 January 2026

UK.scope: Local enforcement on F and B claims

EU.code: EU Food Information to Consumers Regulation FIC
EU Nutrition and Health Claims Register

Middle East.code: ESMA standards Emirates Authority for Standardisation

trigger_events_2025_2026: ASA published 5 rulings on food supplement medicinal claims August 2025
HFSS junk food advertising restrictions effective 5 January 2026
Deliveroo and Uber Eats commission ranges 25 to 35% per order
ASA Active Ad Monitoring covering food supplement and beverage claims

every_sector.name: Every Sector catchall
frameworks_universal: GDPR and UK GDPR data protection
EU AI Act AI systems in marketing

chip_hover_tooltips.GDPR: Universal data-protection baseline · UK + EU + processor obligations
chip_hover_tooltips.FCA: Financial promotion + COBS 4 + MAR · applies wherever property or financial product offers appear
chip_hover_tooltips.SRA: UK solicitor advertising · Standards 8.7/8.9 + Transparency Rules 2018
chip_hover_tooltips.MHRA: UK medicines advertising · Human Medicines Regulations 2012 + ASA CAP-M enforcement
chip_hover_tooltips.ASA: UK advertising claims · CAP Code + AI-powered Active Ad Monitoring (live 2025+)
chip_hover_tooltips.HIPAA: US protected health information · 45 CFR 164.508/164.502 marketing rules
chip_hover_tooltips.EU AI ACT: AI system risk-tier rules · Article 6 high-risk applies to legal + healthcare practice systems
